meta.title: 法治精神与社会治理
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on the rule of law and social governance in Chinese: idioms, legal principles, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 법치 정신·사회 거버넌스 담화: 성어, 법 원칙, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「法治精神」(fǎzhì jīngshén) means "the spirit of rule of law".
explanation.ko: 「法治精神」(fǎzhì jīngshén)는 '법치 정신'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「法治精神」是什么意思？(What does 法治精神 mean?)
choices: 法治精神(the spirit of rule of law)

explanation.en: This phrase means "there are laws to rely on, and they must be strictly followed and enforced", a core rule-of-law principle.
explanation.ko: 이 표현은 '의거할 법이 있고, 반드시 그 법을 따라야 한다'는 뜻으로 법치의 핵심 원칙이다.

questions.prompt: 「有法可依，有法必依」是什么意思？(What does 有法可依，有法必依 mean?)
choices: 有法律作为依据，并且必须严格遵守执行(having laws to rely on, and strictly following/enforcing them)

explanation.en: 「知法犯法」is an idiom meaning "to knowingly break the law".
explanation.ko: 「知法犯法」는 '법을 알면서도 어긴다'는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「知法犯法」是什么意思？(What does 知法犯法 mean?)
choices: 明知故犯，明知违法却依然去做(knowingly breaking the law despite understanding it)

explanation.en: 「社会治理」(shèhuì zhìlǐ) means "social governance".
explanation.ko: 「社会治理」(shèhuì zhìlǐ)는 '사회 거버넌스, 사회 통치'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「社会治理」是什么意思？(What does 社会治理 mean?)

explanation.en: This principle means "everyone is equal before the law", regardless of status or power.
explanation.ko: 이 원칙은 지위나 권력에 관계없이 '법 앞에 만인이 평등하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「法律面前人人平等」是什么意思？(What does 法律面前人人平等 mean?)
choices: 法律面前人人平等(everyone is equal before the law)

explanation.en: 「法治精神」means "the spirit of rule of law".
explanation.ko: 「法治精神」는 '법치 정신'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 一个健全的社会，必须以___为基石，而非依赖个人权威。(A sound society must be built on the foundation of the rule-of-law spirit, rather than relying on individual authority.)

explanation.en: This phrase describes strict legal compliance and enforcement.
explanation.ko: 이 표현은 엄격한 법적 준수와 집행을 묘사한다.

questions.prompt: 现代法治社会的基本要求是___，任何人都不能凌驾于法律之上。(The basic requirement of a modern rule-of-law society is having laws to rely on and strictly enforcing them, no one can be above the law.)

explanation.en: 「知法犯法」means "knowingly breaking the law".
explanation.ko: 「知法犯法」는 '법을 알면서도 어기다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这名官员利用职权谋取私利，属于典型的___行为。(This official used his position for personal gain, a typical case of knowingly breaking the law.)

explanation.en: 「社会治理」means "social governance".
explanation.ko: 「社会治理」는 '사회 거버넌스'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 提升___的水平，需要政府、社会组织和公民共同参与。(Improving the level of social governance requires the joint participation of the government, social organizations, and citizens.)

explanation.en: This principle means everyone is equal before the law.
explanation.ko: 이 원칙은 법 앞에 만인이 평등하다는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 法治社会最核心的原则之一就是___，不论身份地位。(One of the core principles of a rule-of-law society is that everyone is equal before the law, regardless of status.)

explanation.en: 「彰显」(zhāngxiǎn) means "to demonstrate/manifest clearly".
explanation.ko: 「彰显」(zhāngxiǎn)는 '뚜렷이 드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这起案件的公正判决___了法律的权威性和公信力。(The fair verdict in this case reinforced the authority and public trust in the law.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其依靠个人的道德自觉来维持社会秩序，___不如建立健全的法律制度作为保障。(Rather than relying on individual moral self-awareness to maintain social order, it's better to establish a sound legal system as a safeguard.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这名犯罪嫌疑人___拥有强大的社会关系网络，___无法逃脱法律的制裁。(Even though this criminal suspect has a powerful social network, he still couldn't escape legal punishment.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 这个国家的法治建设之所以能够取得显著成效，___是因为它建立了独立公正的司法体系。(The reason this country's rule-of-law development has been able to achieve remarkable success is precisely because it established an independent and impartial judicial system.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一个社会一旦丧失了对法律的敬畏，___容易陷入无序和混乱。(Once a society loses reverence for the law, it easily falls into disorder and chaos.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，社会治理的成效___取决于法治精神在全社会的深入贯彻。(In the final analysis, the effectiveness of social governance still depends on the thorough implementation of the rule-of-law spirit throughout society.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，完善的法律体系与公民的法律意识___构成了法治社会的基石。(From this we can see that both a sound legal system and citizens' legal awareness jointly constitute the foundation of a rule-of-law society.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，法律的生命力___在于其得到切实的执行，而非仅仅停留在纸面上。(As everyone knows, the vitality of law often lies in its actual enforcement, not merely remaining on paper.)

explanation.en: 「填补」(tiánbǔ) means "to fill [a gap]".
explanation.ko: 「填补」(tiánbǔ)는 '메우다, 보완하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这项立法___了长期以来存在的法律空白，具有里程碑式的意义。(This legislation filled a long-standing gap in the law, having milestone significance.)

explanation.en: 「滥用」(lànyòng) means "to abuse/misuse".
explanation.ko: 「滥用」(lànyòng)는 '남용하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 司法独立是防止权力___的重要制度保障。(Judicial independence is an important institutional safeguard against the abuse of power.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 建立健全的〜: 不如建立 (not 建立不如).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '建立健全的〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如建立'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其依靠个人的道德自觉来维持社会秩序，建立不如健全的法律制度作为保障。(Rather than relying on individual moral self-awareness to maintain social order, it's better to establish a sound legal system as a safeguard.) — find the error
choices: 与其依靠个人的道德自觉来维持社会秩序，不如建立健全的法律制度作为保障。
与其依靠个人的道德自觉来维持社会秩序，建立不如健全的法律制度作为保障。
与其依靠个人的道德自觉来维持社会秩序，不如健全建立的法律制度作为保障。
与其依靠个人的道德自觉来维持社会秩序，建立健全不如的法律制度作为保障。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这个国家的法治建设之所以能够取得显著成效，因为是它建立了独立公正的司法体系。(The reason this country's rule-of-law development has been able to achieve remarkable success is precisely because it established an independent and impartial judicial system.) — find the error
choices: 这个国家的法治建设之所以能够取得显著成效，是因为它建立了独立公正的司法体系。
这个国家的法治建设之所以能够取得显著成效，因为是它建立了独立公正的司法体系。
这个国家的法治建设之所以能够取得显著成效，是它因为建立了独立公正的司法体系。
这个国家的法治建设之所以能够取得显著成效，它是因为建立了独立公正的司法体系。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一个社会一旦丧失了对法律的敬畏，容易才陷入无序和混乱。(Once a society loses reverence for the law, it easily falls into disorder and chaos.) — find the error
choices: 一个社会一旦丧失了对法律的敬畏，就容易陷入无序和混乱。
一个社会一旦丧失了对法律的敬畏，容易才陷入无序和混乱。
一个社会一旦丧失了对法律的敬畏，才容易陷入无序和混乱。
一个社会一旦丧失了对法律的敬畏，容易陷入才无序和混乱。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其依靠个人的道德自觉来维持社会秩序，不如建立健全的法律制度作为保障 ("Rather than relying on individual moral self-awareness to maintain social order, it's better to establish a sound legal system as a safeguard").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其依靠个人的道德自觉来维持社会秩序，不如建立健全的法律制度作为保障' (개인의 도덕적 자각에 의존해 사회 질서를 유지하느니 차라리 건전한 법률 제도를 보장책으로 세우는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其依靠个人的道德自觉来维持社会秩序，__________健全的法律制度作为保障。(Rather than relying on individual moral self-awareness to maintain social order, it's better to establish a sound legal system as a safeguard.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一个社会一旦丧失了对法律的敬畏，就容易陷入无序和混乱 ("Once a society loses reverence for the law, it easily falls into disorder and chaos").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一个社会一旦丧失了对法律的敬畏，就容易陷入无序和混乱' (사회는 일단 법에 대한 경외심을 잃으면 무질서와 혼란에 빠지기 쉽다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一个社会一旦丧失了对法律的敬畏，__________陷入无序和混乱。(Once a society loses reverence for the law, it easily falls into disorder and chaos.)
